findings.question: Q1
findings.detail: Correctly identifies exact deliverable: smoke.py with ping() -> str returning "pong", test_smoke.py with test_ping. Matches D2 SC-001, SC-002.

findings.question: Q2
findings.detail: Comprehensive exclusion list matches D2 NOT section and handoff constraint #12.

findings.question: Q3
findings.detail: All boundaries enumerated and confirmed by D10 Key Patterns.

findings.question: Q4
findings.detail: def ping() -> str and def test_ping() -> None match D4 IN-001 and handoff section 3.

findings.question: Q5
findings.detail: staging/FMWK-900-sawmill-smoke/ for code, sawmill/FMWK-900-sawmill-smoke/ for evidence. Matches CLAUDE.md and handoff section 9.

findings.question: Q6
findings.detail: No custom data model. Functional contract matches D4 IN-001, OUT-001, SIDE-001.

findings.question: Q7
findings.flag: CRITICAL_REVIEW_REQUIRED resolved — interpretation correct and aligned with handoff section 5
findings.detail: No new manifest file needed. Package assets limited to smoke.py, test_smoke.py, RESULTS.md.

findings.question: Q8
findings.detail: Zero dependencies. Deterministic hashes required. Matches handoff constraints #7, #8, #13.

findings.question: Q9
findings.detail: One test, DTT discipline, two verification commands, output in RESULTS.md. Matches handoff sections 6 and 8.

findings.question: Q10
findings.detail: Minimal: test imports from module, Sawmill participation via staged files only. No platform_sdk or services.

findings.question: Q11
findings.detail: Three failure modes (ERR-001, ERR-002, ERR-003) match D4 Error Code Enum exactly. No custom handling.

findings.question: Q12
findings.detail: Identifies code-before-test, scaffolding, and scope creep risks. Commits to DTT and STOP.

findings.question: Q13
findings.detail: Correct semantic boundary: Sawmill smoke canary only. Product/governance would violate meaning.
